title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at L&T Realty Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at L&T Realty Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at L&T Realty Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About L&T Realty Advisory Limited:
L&T Realty Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
